content:
📜 1. Final Decisions on Data Preservation & Visual Presentation

✔ Step 1: Preserve all data in markdown documents first.
✔ Step 2: Organize markdown docs into structured folders (e.g., Macro Schedule, RPG System, Game Master Controls, Weekly Modules).
✔ Step 3: Later integrate these into Canvas, Google Sheets, and an interactive Game Hub.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures ALL data is preserved in its rawest form first before formatting for usability.
✔ Allows future adaptability—markdown docs can be converted to multiple platforms later.
✔ Keeps structure clean, modular, and easy to reference.

📜 2. Locking in the Mid-Semester Chaos Event

✔ Event Will Be Triggered Automatically in Week 8
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 434 (chunk 434/555)
